nasb.text: and his relatives, capable men, were 2,700 in number, heads of fathers’ households. And King David made them overseers of the Reubenites, the Gadites and the half-tribe of the Manassites concerning all the affairs of God and of the king.

esv.text: King David appointed him and his brothers, 2,700 men of ability, heads of fathers’ houses, to have the oversight of the Reubenites, the Gadites and the half-tribe of the Manassites for everything pertaining to God and for the affairs of the king.

cnv.text: 耶利雅的親族有二千七百人，都是勇士，各家族的首領；大衛王派他們管理流本支派、迦得支派和瑪拿西半個支派一切有關　神和王的事務。

ccb.text: 耶利雅的亲族有两千七百人，都是能干的族长。大卫王派他们在吕便支派、迦得支派和玛拿西半个支派中办理一切有关上帝和王的事务。
